characters.name: Barbra Jean Hart
characters.description: Barbra Jean HartBiographyAliasesB.J., Babbs Janson, Babby J., Stormy ClearWeatherGenderFemaleRelativesHenry Hart(son),Big Daddy(father), Big Momma (Mother), Siliva (Aunt),Buzzard(Brother), Brother who flips houses (brother), Brother who flipped his pick-up (brother),Katie Ann(sister), Laune (sister),Trent(brother in-law), Lorri Ann (sister), Unnamed GrandfatherRomancesBrock HartSeriesPortrayed byMelissa PetermanBarbra Jean "BJ" Hart(neeBooker) (Born: 1970) is a fictional character in the television seriesReba. "BJ" wasBrock's dental hygienist and had an affair with him as his marriage withRebawas deteriorating. The result was her getting pregnant, and marrying Brock even though he and Reba were not officially divorced yet. Her comically religious behavior was phased out over the course of the first season. Barbra Jean is even less intelligent thanVan, more oblivious thanJake, and is often an easy target for Reba's and Kyra's sarcasm. Despite being noisy and annoying, Barbra Jean is a kind-hearted person with good intentions. She has a tendency to tell "over-the-top" results, and often shares many random and often bizarre facts about her childhood and past. The most that can be understood is that she was born in Friendly, Texas and was known as "the biggest baby in Juno County." She has a currently married sister namedKatie Ann, a brother named "Buzzard," and a father ("Big Daddy") who enjoys drinking and hunting. Brock is afraid of both "Buzzard" and "Big Daddy" because he knows they don't like him. She also claims to have an aunt who spits professionally, ironically named Aunt Silvia. In the last season, she lost a considerable amount of weight and became a weather girl (with the stage name "Stormy Clear-weather") at a public-access cable station. Her meteorological expertise came from the fact her "butt-rometer" could accurately predict rain ever since she was struck by lightning in her, "be-dazzler-studded backside," in 1982. In the last episode, she was traded up as a roving news reporter at her station, calling her segment "Babs Janson: Street Walker." Barbra Jean has had a crush on Dr. Morgan since they met. Dr. Morgan says that she has underwent "transference" with him, a situation where the separated spouse becomes attracted to their therapist. She has on two occasions kissed him, stole his bubblegum and gave it back, and then afterwards sang "Amazing Grace". She is revealed to still have a crush on him when she sees him again later.

characters.name: Big Daddy
characters.description: Big Daddy is the father ofBarbra Jean HartHe is intimidating and insulting to people that he does not know well. He has openly admitted to drinking and carrying guns, he makes rude comments about his wife such as: "I have not left her because she's too ugly to kiss goodbye"!

characters.name: Bill
characters.description: {{{Image size}}}px Bill was a carpenter thatReba Harthired to fix her sink afterBrockmessed it up. Bill was trying to plan a date with Reba to pick out a new faucet and Reba politely declined due to the fact that her divorce was not yet final.

characters.name: Brian
characters.description: Brian Collins, known asBrian, was Reba's boyfriend in 3 episodes one of which they broke up in. He is a widower, has no kids and three dogs. In "Switch", In hopes of resuscitating her non-existent love life, Reba hits the bar scene with her friend Lori Ann. Cheyenne finally convinces a reluctant Reba to try insta-dating, and everyone is surprised when she actually makes a love connection, starting with Brian.

characters.name: Brock Hart
characters.description: Brock HartBiographyFull NameBrock Enroll HartAliasesBrick, Brick-head, Betty, Doc, Splitty, Poodle, Golden GodBirth1958, Fredericksburg TexasStatusAliveGenderMaleRelativesJohn D. Hart(deceased Father)Elizabeth Hart(mother)Cheyenne Montgomery(daughter)Kyra Hart(daughter)Jake Hart(son)Van Montgomery(son-in-law)Elizabeth Montgomery(granddaughter)Henry Hart(son)unborn grandsonRomancesBarbra Jean Hart(Wife)Reba Hart(Ex-Wife)OccupationDentistResidenceSan Antonio, Texas (Formerly)Houston, Texas (Currently)Fredericksburg Texas (Hometown)SeriesSeasonsS1•S2•S3•S4•S5•S6EpisodesThe Pilot Ep: 1 I Thought I`d Lost You Ep: 2FirstPilotLastThe Kids Are AlrightPortrayed byChristopher RichBrock Enroll Hartis a fictional character in the television seriesReba. Reba Hart(Ex-Wife) Brock Enroll Hart was born in 1958 to John D. & Elizabeth Hart. Growing up, Brock and his father didn't really have a relationship. He went to Vanderbilt High School and was a quarterback for their football team. He attended the University of Houston on a football scholarship and majored in dentistry. During high school, he got together with Reba's best friend Lori Ann Gardner and Reba was dating Parker Reynolds. Reba and Parker broke up and Brock and Lori Ann broke up. During college, both Reba and Brock got a job at their local bar; Brock was a barkeep and Reba was a waitress. While Brock and Reba were working at the bar, Reba started dating a man namedTerry Holliway. After sometime together, Terry was going to going propose to Reba, but when Reba seen Terry holding Brock by the shirt thinking he was going to hit Brock, Reba ran right over to them and told Terry that she loved Brock. So, they decided to break up.

characters.description:

Trent (Brother in-law) Buzzard isBarbra Jean Hart's older brother whom extremely disprove ofBrock, a trait he shared with his father.
He is thought to be a crazy person by everybody except Barbra Jean and eventuallyReba Hart,Van Montgomery,Cheyenne Montgomery, andJake Hart. Brock is deathly afraid of him as seen when Buzzards enters a room, he shrieks and runs, this originates from two things, one is when, according to Brock; Buzzard picked him up and threw him into a lake that was freezing cold, Buzzard later states that his Grandma dared him to and that he had no choice, and second that while Brock was sleeping. Buzzard shaved off one of Brock's eyebrows, Brock says that Buzzard keeps it in his wallet. He made fast friends with Cheyenne when he mentions that he is an alcoholic, and with Van when he mentions how much he loves "Underdog", and gives good advice to Jake about stealing. He ends up being good friends and even considered family by Reba by the end of the episode.Once Brock gave him a guitar for Christmas. He lit it on fire while he was holding it.

characters.name: Caroline
characters.description: Caroline isRobbie's mother who became worried about the "inappropriate" behavior ofVan MontgomeryandCheyenne Montgomery. She forbids Robbie from going over toReba Hart's home but was fine with havingJake Hartover to her's. When Reba and her scheduled a campout for the children, she underminded her and held another campout and claimed she forgot the plans. She planned to check her calender for another day for the campout but Reba saw through her secrecy.

characters.name: Cheyenne Hart
characters.description: Cheyenne Hart-MontgomeryBiographyBirthMay 7th, 1984GenderFemaleRelativesReba Hart(mother)Brock Hart(father)Barbra Jean Hart(step-mother)J.V. McKinney(grandfather)Helen McKinney(grandmother)Kyra Hart(younger sister)Jake Hart(younger brother)Henry Hart(youngest half-brother)Elizabeth Montgomery(daughter)Unborn SonRomancesVan Montgomery(2001-Present)SeriesPortrayed byJoAnna GarcíaCheyenne Brooke Montgomery(neeHart) is a fictional character in the television seriesReba. She is portrayed byJoAnna García. BrockandReba'soldest daughter, who initially is looking forward to her senior year of high school before learning that she is pregnant. She married her husband,Van Montgomery, and they moved in with Cheyenne's mom, Reba. Cheyenne gives birth to their daughter,Elizabeth, after going into labor on graduation day. At the beginning of the series, she comes across as a typical dumb blonde and is self-centered and irresponsible. However, her intelligence and sense of responsibility improve as she raises her daughter and studies dentistry in college. She is highly sensitive, especially when she is insulted (mainly byKyra, her younger sister). Cheyenne later helps out at a homeless shelter, improving her shallowness greatly. When she comes to the realization that she is an alcoholic, she's inspired to discontinue doing dentistry for her major, and decides to study counseling for those affected by alcohol and drugs. Dentistry was her initial major in college due to her father being a dentist. Her mother, Reba, became extremely worried about this career choice, pointing out that dentistry takes eight years to complete and Cheyenne has a tendency to not stick too long in an interest (this came to be true three seasons later when Cheyenne changed majors).

characters.name: Chip
characters.description: This article is astubabout aCharacter. You can help theReba Wikiby expanding it. Chip wasKyra's boyfriend for some time, before she broke up with him. He has hair that covers his entire face, and he does not talk because, according to Kyra, he is shy. Because of his looks, Reba is suspicious of him and unsure of letting him stay with Kyra unsupervised, though she eventually consents.Jakelater tells Reba that they had been upstairs. Though Kyra insists that she didn't, Reba grounds her and forbids her from seeing Chip again. Reba later finds out that Jake had lied simply to get back at Kyra for calling him a crybaby.

characters.name: Coach Harrell
characters.description: Coach Harrell is the head football coach forVanand Chyenne's school, West Chester High School.

characters.name: Dan Montgomery
characters.description: Dan (right) Sue, and Cheyenne Dan Montgomery isVan Montgomery's disapproving father whom dislikesCheyenne Montgomeryand wishes Van would dump her and come home. Dan is a very controlling father, as seen inTea and Antipathy, which is the reason Van was so respectful to him. After Dan tells Reba she has no morals, Van finally has the guts to stand up to him. Van defends Reba and tells Dan that his whole life he's been nothing but a bully. Van gives him the keys back to the new truck he gave him, and he and Reba leave the Montgomery house.

characters.description: Dennis Dugan was the president of the Westchester High School chess team, he helpedVan Montgomeryfind and persuade the alianated voters. It was thanks to him thatCheyenne Montgomerywom the election for prom queen in the episodeThe King and I.

characters.name: Dolly Majors
characters.description: Dolly Majors is a prime real-estate agent in Houson, according toBarbra Jeanher face is on every bus bench in town. She was interested inRebafor a job, so she popped in a few days before the interview was scheduled to see what Reba was really like. She was so persuasive that she talkedVanandCheyennea house and soldBrockand Barbra Jean a vacation home inRica Costa Rica. She also knows a secret about Brock and Barbra Jean's house, presumably bad. Barbra Jean refers to her as "My Mini Me" or "Twins Seperated At Birth". She also gaveJakea bebe gun.

characters.name: Dr. Morgan
characters.description: Dr. Jack Morgan is a psychiatrist who worked withBrockandBarbra Jeanduring their separation. And during which time Barbra Jean became attracted to him and so wasReba. Later, Reba ends up dating him until he goes out of town but when he comes back Reba makes the shocking discovery that he is still married, because his wife hasn't signed the divorce papers yet. In the season four episodeDate of Mirth, Barbra Jean confesses to Reba that she's attracted to her new marriage therapist. Reba tells her to go talk to him about it. Van and Cheyenne convince Reba to go with Barbra Jean to talk to Dr. Morgan so nothing happens. Barbra Jean gets all giddy while talking to Dr. Morgan and tells him she's attracted to him. Dr. Morgan explains why she's attracted to him and then transfers her and Brock to another therapist. Meanwhile Reba is very attracted to Dr. Morgan also and she asks him out. Cheyenne and Van find out that Reba is going out with Dr. Morgan and tells her to tell Barbra Jean because she is unaware of their date. After much discussion Reba finally goes out on an interesting date with Dr. Morgan (guest-starred byJames Denton).

characters.name: Dr. Susan Peters
characters.description: Dr Susan Peters is a family counseling psychiatrist who worked with The Hart Family during the custody arrangement in season one. "The judge used the word brawl."

characters.description: Dr. Todd is a therapist on the episodeEncounters.  He teaches how to resolve conflict. He graduated from a university in Mexico. He is portrayed by Martin Mull. "And I'm betting you're the first one to cry."

characters.description: In the season two episode "Safe Dating" Dylan briefly datedKyra Hart, to whichReba HartandBrock Hartdid not immediatly approve. After Reba met divorced fatherGreg Hewitt, they began safe dating. Kyra broke up with him, originally because of Reba medelling in her life by dating her boyfriend's father but it was later revealed that their relationship ended becasue he was "a cry baby".

characters.name: Elizabeth Hart
characters.description: Elizabeth "Liz" Hart is a Fictional Character on the American TV Sitcom Reba (2001-2007). She is the  mother of Brock Hart and widow of John D. Hart. A lot of people have thought that Van Montgomery and Cheyenne Montgomery's child Elizabeth Montgomery was named after her.  Eliza Hart is Brock Hart's mother who used to disapprove ofReba Hart, always making rude comments about how she was dressed or the condition of her house, but when she visited in the episodeAnd the Grammy Goes to...she was shockingly polite and nice to Reba even though she went to lengths to purposely make herself and her house look like a mess so she could get back at her. She revealed to Reba that Brock still loved her but was a misunderstanding.She likes to mess with people like when Van tells her that they named Elizabeth after her she says that her given name wasn't Elizabeth but Eliza since people mostly call her "Liz" it is hard to know, Reverend nervously states that it is Eliza... Beth.

characters.name: Frank
characters.description: Frank is a boy thatCheyennemet at her support group for recovering alcoholics. The two have a great friendship, which makesVanreally jealous. On Halloween, Van seemingly killed Frank and buried him in the trunk of his car, and everyone is freaking out, with Cheyenne calling her husband a monster. Fortunately, it turns out to be a prank and Frank is actually gay.

Barbra Jean admits in “Regarding Henry” that she one time lost Henry at the mall. When Barbra Jean decides to take Henry and Elizabeth to the zoo, disapproving Reba decides to go with them.

characters.name: J.V. McKinney
characters.description: J.V. Mckinney is the father ofReba Nell Hart, husband ofHelen McKinney, and grandfather to Jake, Cheyenne, and Kyra Hart. Later in the show, he becomes a great grandfather when Elizabeth Montgomery, Cheyenne & Van Montgomery's daughter is born.

characters.name: J.V. McKinney
characters.description: J.V. Mckinney is the father ofReba Nell Hart, husband ofHelen McKinney, and grandfather to Jake, Cheyenne, and Kyra Hart. Later in the show, he becomes a great grandfather when Elizabeth Montgomery, Cheyenne & Van Montgomery's daughter is born.

characters.name: Jake Hart
characters.description: Jake HartBiographyGenderMaleRelativesReba Hart(mother)Brock Hart(father)Barbra Jean Hart(Step-mother)Cheyenne Montgomery(Oldest Sister)Van Montgomery(Brother-In-Law)Kyra Hart(Older Sister)Henry Hart(Younger half-brother)Elizabeth Montgomery(Niece)Unborn boy (Nephew)J.V. McKinney(grandfather)Helen McKinney(Grandmother)John D. Hart(Grandfather)SeriesPortrayed byMitch HollermanJacob "Jake" Mitchell Hart(born: 1994) is a fictional character in the television seriesReba. The youngest of the Hart children, Jake is often teased by his sisterKyra. In the earlier seasons, Jake sometimes is only seen for one scene where he would crack a joke or just mention something that involves the current topic. Jake is pretty oblivious of what goes on around him and has a habit of saying the first thing that comes to his mind without thinking. He acts like a normal boy for his age, although in earlier seasons he displays feminine characteristics that worry his father,Brock, such as wanting to go to a scarf museum.
